category_sources: Official repository describes PJSIP as a multimedia communication library implementing SIP, SDP, RTP, STUN, TURN, and ICE.
source_facts.description: C library for multimedia protocols such as SIP, SDP, RTP and more.
display_name_sources: Official documentation title is PJSIP Project Online Documentation.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository lists https://docs.pjsip.org as the main documentation site.
Official docs site is titled PJSIP Project Online Documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/pjsip/pjproject, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official repository describes NAT traversal and STUN, TURN, ICE support.
source_facts.description lists SIP, SDP, RTP, and multimedia protocols.
